schema.description: A page object with links to move to other pages and the list of objects.

first.description: The link to the first page.

items.description: A Merchant Entry with the Google Merchant Id and the Website URL
items.title: MerchantEntry

last.description: The link to the last page.

next.description: The link to the next page or `null` if there's no page.

prev.description: The link to the previous page or `null` if there's no page.

self.description: The link to the current page.

schema.title: PageMerchantEntry
